reasoning: 1. TP Dist: 2676.9. 2. SL Dist: 1873.1. 3. TP/SL Ratio: 1.43. 4. Regime: HIGH_VOLATILITY/DISTRIBUTION. 5. Logic: Following the Red Team critique, the POC (66128) is identified as a magnet rather than a floor. The 15m chart reveals a Bear Pennant breakdown following a failed auction at the POC. High volume on the drop confirms distribution. The path of least resistance is toward the Value Area Low (63.5k) through the Low Volume Node (LVN) gap. reasoning_zh: 1. TP 距离: 2676.9。2. SL 距离: 1873.1。3. TP/SL 比率: 1.43。4. 市场环境: 高波动/派发。5. 逻辑: 采纳红队审查意见，POC (66128) 目前表现为引力位而非支撑位。15m 周期显示在 POC 附近的失败拍卖后形成了看跌旗形破位。下跌过程中的高成交量确认了派发行为。由于 POC 到 VAL (63.5k) 之间存在低成交量真空区，价格大概率向下寻求流动性。止损设在 68k 阻力簇上方以对冲看跌逻辑失效的风险。
